'''鈭歞-v-r''' ('''kadavar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:brainfuck|brainfuck]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brainfuck|brainfuck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-v-r
|-
! Lemma
| kadavar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidavar|thidavar]] || [[word:jidavar|jidavar]] || [[word:shidavar|shidavar]] || [[word:kidavar|kidavar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudavar|thuthudavar]] || [[word:jujudavar|jujudavar]] || [[word:shushudavar|shushudavar]] || [[word:kukudavar|kukudavar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudavar|thudavar]] || [[word:judavar|judavar]] || [[word:shudavar|shudavar]] || [[word:kudavar|kudavar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudavar|thudavar]] || [[word:judavar|judavar]] || [[word:shudavar|shudavar]] || [[word:kudavar|kudavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedavar|thedavar]] || [[word:jedavar|jedavar]] || [[word:shedavar|shedavar]] || [[word:kedavar|kedavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodavar|thothodavar]] || [[word:jojodavar|jojodavar]] || [[word:shoshodavar|shoshodavar]] || [[word:kokodavar|kokodavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodavar|thodavar]] || [[word:jodavar|jodavar]] || [[word:shodavar|shodavar]] || [[word:kodavar|kodavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodavar|thodavar]] || [[word:jodavar|jodavar]] || [[word:shodavar|shodavar]] || [[word:kodavar|kodavar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:davar|davar]] || [[word:davar|davar]] || [[word:davar|davar]] || [[word:davar|davar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:davar|davar]] || [[word:davar|davar]] || [[word:davar|davar]] || [[word:davar|davar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:davar|davar]] || [[word:davar|davar]] || [[word:davar|davar]] || [[word:davar|davar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:davar|davar]] || [[word:davar|davar]] || [[word:davar|davar]] || [[word:davar|davar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙davar|th忙davar]] || [[word:j忙davar|j忙davar]] || [[word:sh忙davar|sh忙davar]] || [[word:k忙davar|k忙davar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadavar|thathadavar]] || [[word:jajadavar|jajadavar]] || [[word:shashadavar|shashadavar]] || [[word:kakadavar|kakadavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadavar|thadavar]] || [[word:jadavar|jadavar]] || [[word:shadavar|shadavar]] || [[word:kadavar|kadavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadavar|thadavar]] || [[word:jadavar|jadavar]] || [[word:shadavar|shadavar]] || [[word:kadavar|kadavar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadavar|shadavar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadavar|goshadavar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadavar|gokishadavar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadavarn眉|shadavarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadavarnkn眉|goshadavarnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavarn眉|gokishadavarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadavarsh毛|shadavarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadavarnksh毛|goshadavarnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadavarsh毛|gokishadavarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavarro|shadavarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavarnkro|goshadavarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavarro|gokishadavarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavarmu|shadavarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavarnkmu|goshadavarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavarmu|gokishadavarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadavarsher|shadavarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadavarnksher|goshadavarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadavarsher|gokishadavarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadavarng|shadavarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadavarnkng|goshadavarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadavarng|gokishadavarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadavarya|shadavarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadavarnkya|goshadavarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadavarya|gokishadavarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadavaryam|shadavaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadavarnkyam|goshadavarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadavaryam|gokishadavaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavarn眉sh毛|shadavarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavarnkn眉sh毛|goshadavarnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavarn眉sh毛|gokishadavarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavarn眉ro|shadavarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavarnkn眉ro|goshadavarnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavarn眉ro|gokishadavarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavarn眉mu|shadavarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavarnkn眉mu|goshadavarnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavarn眉mu|gokishadavarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavarsh毛n眉|shadavarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavarnksh毛n眉|goshadavarnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavarsh毛n眉|gokishadavarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavarsh毛ro|shadavarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavarnksh毛ro|goshadavarnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavarsh毛ro|gokishadavarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavarsh毛mu|shadavarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavarnksh毛mu|goshadavarnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavarsh毛mu|gokishadavarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavarron眉|shadavarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavarnkron眉|goshadavarnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavarron眉|gokishadavarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavarrosh毛|shadavarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavarnkrosh毛|goshadavarnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavarrosh毛|gokishadavarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavarromu|shadavarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavarnkromu|goshadavarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavarromu|gokishadavarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavarmun眉|shadavarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavarnkmun眉|goshadavarnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavarmun眉|gokishadavarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavarmush毛|shadavarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavarnkmush毛|goshadavarnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavarmush毛|gokishadavarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavarmuro|shadavarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavarnkmuro|goshadavarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavarmuro|gokishadavarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
